meaning: n.[化]石脑油(一种石油馏分)
examples: Objective: To extract and determine Naphtha in Fennel fruit.
Various solvent naphtha fraction generally have to go through refining.
Light petroleum distillate, generally known AS naphtha, wAS the logical choice.
It can be called: lease-condensate, ultra-light crude, naphtha or natural gasoline, depending on who is naming it.
If too much naphtha is coming out of the crude stream then the whole stream has to be slowed down.
